options.name: Archery
options.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

options.name: Defense
options.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: When wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, +2 to damage rolls.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice when using two-handed or versatile weapons.

options.name: Protection
options.description: Use your reaction to impose disadvantage on an attack against an ally within 5 feet.

options.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
options.description: Add your ability modifier to the off-hand attack's damage roll.
